dtof64x8_init_uart.tooltip: Initialize the 64x8 dTOF sensor over ESP32 hardware UART at fixed 921600 baud.

dtof64x8_config_frame_single.tooltip: Configure the sensor for single-frame mode. Continuous mode is not implemented in the upstream library.

dtof64x8_config_full.tooltip: Configure output for all 64*8 ranging points.

dtof64x8_config_line.tooltip: Configure output for all 64 points in one line. Line range is 1-8.

dtof64x8_config_point.message0: 64x8 dTOF %1 configure single point line %2 point %3
dtof64x8_config_point.tooltip: Configure output for one point. Line range is 1-8 and point range is 1-64.

dtof64x8_config_points.message0: 64x8 dTOF %1 configure point range line %2 start %3 end %4
dtof64x8_config_points.tooltip: Configure output for a continuous point range in one line. Line range is 1-8 and point range is 1-64.

dtof64x8_read_data.tooltip: Trigger and read one frame. Returns parsed point count; negative values mean error or timeout.

dtof64x8_point_value.tooltip: Read cached point data after the last refresh. Index starts from 0.
